name: GH_PreviewMeshArgs
summary: This class is passed to objects that implement IGH_PreviewData during mesh drawing operations.

constructors.name: GH_PreviewMeshArgs
constructors.signature: public GH_PreviewMeshArgs(RhinoViewport vp, DisplayPipeline pl, DisplayMaterial mat, MeshingParameters meshParams)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_PreviewMeshArgs class

properties.name: Material
properties.summary: Gets the material in which meshes ought to be drawn.

properties.name: MeshingParameters
properties.summary: Gets the meshing parameters which ought to be used for meshing breps and surfaces. If this property returns a null reference, meshes are supposed to be omitted.

properties.name: Pipeline
properties.summary: Gets the Display Pipeline we're currently drawing with.

properties.name: Viewport
properties.summary: Gets the Viewport in which we're currently drawing.
